creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
Hi all,

this is a big updating of haskell ports. The start point is ghc-6.10.4.

The three files:

MD5 (ghc-6.10.4-i386-jm0-freebsd6-boot.tar.bz2) = e528ad305e12ec45b051acf22a41929f
MD5 (ghc-6.10.4-i386-jm0-freebsd7-boot.tar.bz2) = 3bb1b91d0f06af390d493d7d936b6086
MD5 (ghc-6.10.4-i386-jm0-freebsd8-boot.tar.bz2) = c4e4ce9daae4bfdda1dcc14813cb9507

was built on:

FreeBSD 6.4-Release
FreeBSD 7.2-Release
FreeBSD 8-Beta2

Hi hope all to be OK.

Giuseppe Pilichi aka Jacula Modyun
